name: Sourdough Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Vanilla Extract OR 1 tsp Grated Orange Peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add egg and mix until blended.
3. Stir in bananas and sourdough starter. Add vanilla extract or grated orange peel.
4. Gradually add flour mixture, alternating with salt, baking powder, and baking soda, stirring after each addition until just combined.
5. Mix in chopped walnuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely before slicing.
